name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Curl Start Combination and VBS Execute Arbitrary PowerShell Code
notes:
This Building Block detects execution of arbitrary PowerShell code using SyncAppvPublishingServer.vbs. Adversaries can use curl to download payloads remotely and execute them.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Sreeman, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Curl Download And Execute Combination
SIGMA Description: Adversaries can use curl to download payloads remotely and execute them. Curl is included by default in Windows 10 build 17063 and later.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: SyncAppvPublishingServer VBS Execute Arbitrary PowerShell Code
SIGMA Description: Executes arbitrary PowerShell code using SyncAppvPublishingServer.vbs

Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Curl Start Combination and VBS Execute Arbitrary PowerShell Code on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /c %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%curl %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%http%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-o%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%&%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\syncappvpublishingserver.vbs%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%;%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Curl Start Combination and VBS Execute Arbitrary PowerShell Code on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /c %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%curl %' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%http%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-o%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%&%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\syncappvpublishingserver.vbs%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%;%') AQL filter query
